variants: Vesa Suomalainen, originally from Newtunnel Bridge, is a resident of Salmonberry Lane today. Known for his engineering prowess, he developed the Needlepoint Channel Engine, a significant invention within his field. His achievements have not gone unnoticed, as he was honored with the Gemstone Pavilion Distinction for his innovative contributions. Vesa is also an enthusiastic member of the Keeprite Ice Sculptors, where he merges his technical skills with his artistic flair for ice sculpting.

Living on Salmonberry Lane, Vesa Suomalainen was born in Newtunnel Bridge. His remarkable creation, the Needlepoint Channel Engine, showcases his engineering talent and has earned him the prestigious Gemstone Pavilion Distinction as a testament to his innovative abilities. In addition to his engineering career, he is an active participant in the Keeprite Ice Sculptors, embracing his passion for ice sculpting and engaging with fellow artists.
